questions.question: Aung San Suu Kyi led party has clinched second time parliamentary election victory in which country?
questions.explanation: The ruling party of Myanmar – the National League for Democracy (NLD) led by Nobel laureate Aung San Suu Kyi has claimed a landslide victory in the second parliamentary election of the country. This is the second election being held in Myanmar after the end of a Military Rule in 2015.

questions.question: Ministry of Power has issued notification to cover which organisations under the Energy Conservation (EC) Act 2001?
questions.explanation: The Ministry of Power has issued notification to cover all the Electricity Distribution Companies (DISCOMs) under the preview of the Energy Conservation (EC) Act 2001.The DISCOMs will be governed under the various provisions of EC Act, like Appointment of Energy Manager, Energy Accounting & Auditing, identification of Energy Losses etc.

questions.question: Who chaired the 20th Summit of SCO Council of Heads of States?
questions.explanation: The 20th Summit of SCO Council of Heads of State was held in Video Conference Format. The Meeting was chaired by the Russian President Vladimir Putin.Prime Minister Narendra Modi led the Indian delegation to the summit. Other SCO Member States were represented by their Presidents, while India and Pakistan were represented by their respective Prime Ministers.

questions.question: Who represented India in the first BRICS Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors (FMCBG) meeting?
questions.explanation: The Union Minister for Finance and Corporate Affairs Nirmala Sitharaman represented India in the first BRICS Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors meeting.The meeting was held under the Russian Chairmanship. The meeting is expected to include discussions on the outcomes of the G20 Saudi Presidency in 2020, a digital platform for the New Development Bank and to expand membership of the New Development Bank.

questions.question: What is the abbreviation of ‘IBSA’, that is seen in news recently?
questions.explanation: India-Brazil-South Africa (IBSA) report titled ‘Deepening Cooperation in IBSA: Perspectives from Key Sectors’ has been launched recently. The report has been launched by the Secretary, Ministry of External Affairs Rahul Chhabra. The report has been prepared by the 2nd batch of Fellows under the IBSA Visiting Fellowship Program.

questions.question: Tinsukia, where Oil India made a natural gas discovery, is located in which state?
questions.explanation: India’s second largest oil producer Oil India Ltd has recently made a natural gas discovery at a well drilled in Tinsukia, Assam.As per the statement issued by the organisation, the Dinjan-1 well in Tinsukia in upper Assam basin found 10 meters of hydrocarbon-bearing sands. This discovery will help them explore new areas for further oil and gas exploration in Assam.

questions.question: Which is the only corporatized major port of India?
questions.explanation: Kamarajar Port located in Ennore, on the Coromandel Coast is the only corporatized major port of India. It is also the first port in India which is a public company.The Port was seen in news recently, as it has handled the largest ever container vessel – MSC Faith. As per the company, the new generation terminal is equipped with latest gantry cranes and sufficient backup yard.

questions.question: Under the Atmanirbhar Bharat’s third stimulus package, Rs 3000 crore has been released to which institution, under IDEAS scheme?
questions.explanation: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman unveiled the Atmanirbhar Bharat’s third stimulus package.Under the package, Rs 3,000 crore is to be released to EXIM Bank for promotion of ‘Project Exports’ through lines of credits (LoC). This has been released under Indian Development and Economic Assistance Scheme (IDEAS) Scheme.

questions.question: Which festival is also called Dhanwantri Jayanthi?
questions.explanation: The festival of Dhanteras is also known as Dhan Trayodashi and Dhanwantri Jayanti. This year, it is celebrated in 13th November, the day before Diwali and marks the first day of the Diwali celebration.It is celebrated on the thirteenth lunar day in the Hindu calendar month of Ashwin. Dhanwantri, who is considered the God of Ayurveda, is worshipped on this day.

questions.question: What is the theme of the ‘National Ayurveda Day 2020’?
questions.explanation: National Ayurveda Day is celebrated on the same day of Dhanwantri Jayanti since 2016. This year it was celebrated on November 13.National Ayurveda Day was celebrated across the country on the theme of ‘Ayurveda for Covid-19’. The day is observed to spread awareness on the importance of Ayurveda in our daily lives.
